name: Jalapeno Pizza Crust for the Breadmachine
recipeIngredient: 1 Tbsp Just Shortening or Prune puree
recipeInstructions:
1. Place ingredients in your bread machine in the order recommended by your machine's manufacturer.
2. Set to dough cycle.
Note: Watch the dough and add more water slowly (up to 1/4 cup more) until the dough obtains the proper consistency. Check the dough again during the 2nd kneading -- if it gets a bit thin, add some organic blue corn meal until the consistency is right.
Note: Just Shortening can be purchased at your local health food store and consists of a combination of plum puree and prune puree, resulting in a very thick consistency.
